Off Calendar Jan-27-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ABM INDUSTRIES INCORPORATED's Motion To: 1) Compel Arbitration Of Plaintiff Foad Alowdi's Claims And 2) Stay Proceedings.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant ABM Industries Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration is denied.
